_instructions: Fill in each section with your specific areas of interest. The digest will scan every article for relevance to these entities and include a dedicated 'Relevance' section when matches are found. Delete any categories you don't need. Add as many entries as you like.
focus_description: Brief description of your focus (e.g., 'Early-stage investor in climate tech and advanced manufacturing')

portfolio_companies._note: Copy this object for each company. 'keywords' are terms that signal relevance in an article.
portfolio_companies.name: Company Name
portfolio_companies.description: One-sentence description of what they do

people.role: Their role or why they matter

excluded_topics: _note: Topics to explicitly de-prioritize or skip
